DROP TABLE [RDM].[PERF_MKTNG_CAMPAIGN_PRODUCTS_MAPPING]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [RDM].[PERF_MKTNG_CAMPAIGN_PRODUCTS_MAPPING]
( 
	[CampaignProduct] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](20)  NULL,
	[ProductID] [nvarchar](20)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
